'''Executive Results''' was a front company for [[Syndicate One]]. It was responsible for hiring and outfitting [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] to perform operations dictated by [[Saujutta-Ok-Topii]]'s inner circle. Their offices were located in starports near the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. Officially they were equipment retailers, but underneath secretly smuggeled weapons inside machinery and vehicles. Executive Results used merceneries as [[Security Guard/Legends|security guards]], [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], messengers, and diversions. Few involved reailzed their cargoes contained weapons from Syndicate One. General cargo was brought to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Valgauth/Legends|Valgauth]], where weapons were inserted and hidden inside. Once packaged, the cargo and its hidden contraband was shipped to an Executive Results office and then deliverd to the customer. Fewer than a dozen [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] made the run from Executive Results to Valgauth.<ref name="Yard" />

{{Company-stub}}
